nasb.text: Within it there were figures resembling four living beings. And this was their appearance: they had human form.

esv.text: And from the midst of it came the likeness of four living creatures. And this was their appearance: they had a human likeness,

cnv.text: 在火中又有四個活物的形狀，牠們的樣子是這樣：牠們都有人的形狀。

ccb.text: 火中有四个像人形的活物，
